channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [NBCC] NBCC signs two MoUs with HUDCO for redevelopment & project funding
item.description:
🔥 Trending

NBCC (India) Ltd has entered into two Memorandums of Understanding (MoUs) with Housing and Urban Development Corporation Limited (HUDCO) on April 11, 2026. The first MoU involves the redevelopment of August Kranti Bhawan in New Delhi, where NBCC will handle techno-economic feasibility, construction, project management, and monetization. The second MoU focuses on HUDCO providing funds for NBCC's ongoing and upcoming self-sustainable model projects, with NBCC offering project management and marketing consultancy. This collaboration aims to accelerate project execution, boost asset value, and contribute to urban infrastructure development.

  • NBCC signed two MoUs with HUDCO on April 11, 2026.
  • First MoU for August Kranti Bhawan redevelopment in New Delhi.
  • Second MoU for HUDCO to fund NBCC's self-sustainable projects.
  • NBCC to provide project management and marketing services.
  • Partnership aims to expedite projects and enhance asset value.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NBCC (India) Ltd | Category: MoU

item.title: [MAHESH] Mahesh Developers approves Q4 & FY25 audited financial results
item.description:
Mahesh Developers Ltd's Board of Directors, at a meeting held on June 27, 2025, approved the Audited Financial Results (Standalone) for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2025. The results were recommended by the Audit Committee and accompanied by an Auditors' Report with an unmodified opinion. The company reported a net loss for the quarter ended March 31, 2025, but a net profit for the full financial year ended March 31, 2025. The filing includes the audited financial results and a declaration of unmodified opinion, in compliance with Regulation 33 of SEBI (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Board approved Q4 and FY25 audited standalone financial results.
  • Auditors issued an unmodified opinion on the financial statements.
  • Company reported a net loss for Q4 FY25, but a profit for full FY25.
  • Compliance with SEBI (LODR) Regulation 33 was confirmed.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mahesh Developers Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [ASTERDM] Aster DM invests ₹96 Cr to expand Whitefield hospital by 159 beds
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Aster DM Healthcare has invested ₹96 crore to expand its Women & Children facility at Aster Whitefield Hospital in Bengaluru. This expansion increases the hospital's bed capacity from 380 to 539 beds, adding 159 dedicated beds. The new 'Aster Women & Children' facility offers comprehensive services including specialized maternity care, water birthing, advanced laparoscopic gynaecology, a child development centre, foetal medicine, a Level 3A NICU, fertility services, and pediatric intensive care. This strategic expansion reinforces Aster DM Healthcare's 12-year legacy in Bengaluru and, combined with other upcoming projects, will boost its total capacity in Karnataka to 2,573 beds, positioning it among the top three private healthcare providers in the state.

  • Aster DM invested ₹96 crore in Aster Whitefield Hospital expansion.
  • Hospital bed capacity increased from 380 to 539 beds.
  • New 159-bed facility offers specialized women and child care.
  • Expansion strengthens Aster's presence in Bengaluru healthcare market.
  • Total Karnataka bed capacity to reach 2,573, becoming a top 3 provider.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Aster DM Healthcare Ltd | Category: Expansion

item.title: [SHYAMMETL] Shyam Metalics gets CPCB relief for Rengali plant; operations to resume
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Shyam Metalics and Energy Ltd issued a clarification regarding social media rumors about its Rengali Plant in Sambalpur, Odisha. The Central Pollution Control Board (CPCB) had previously directed the closure of one Pellet Plant, the Ferro Alloys Plant, and the Power Plant at the facility due to pollution-related non-compliances. The company promptly made representations to the CPCB, detailing remedial measures. Consequently, CPCB has granted relief from the closure directions, instructing the Odisha State Pollution Control Board to facilitate the resumption of operations. Shyam Metalics has been given three months to fully address and comply with all findings and observations and is committed to achieving complete compliance within this period.

  • CPCB had directed closure of specific units at Shyam Metalics' Rengali plant due to non-compliance.
  • Company successfully appealed to CPCB, presenting undertaken remedial measures.
  • CPCB granted relief from closure, directing OSPCB to resume operations.
  • Shyam Metalics has three months to achieve full compliance with CPCB observations.
  • Company is committed to timely compliance and advises reliance on official communications.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shyam Metalics and Energy Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [PPLPHARMA] Piramal Pharma's US FDA inspection at Kentucky facility closed with VAI
item.description:
The US FDA inspection at Piramal Pharma's Lexington, Kentucky manufacturing facility, previously disclosed on December 11, 2025, has concluded. The company received an Establishment Inspection Report (EIR) with a "Voluntary Action Indicated" (VAI) classification, marking the successful closure of the inspection. This intimation was filed on the first working day post-EIR receipt.

  • Piramal Pharma's Kentucky facility US FDA inspection closed.
  • Received Establishment Inspection Report (EIR).
  • EIR classified as Voluntary Action Indicated (VAI).
  • Marks successful closure of the inspection.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Piramal Pharma Ltd | Category: USFDA

item.title: [MUKANDLTD] Mukand Board to Meet May 14 for FY26 Results & Dividend
item.description:
Mukand Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on May 14, 2026. The primary agenda includes considering and approving the Audited Financial Results (Standalone and Consolidated) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the Board will consider recommending a dividend, if any, on the equity shares for the same financial year. The trading window for the company's securities will remain closed for designated persons from April 01, 2026, to May 16, 2026, in compliance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 14, 2026.
  • To approve Audited Financial Results for Q4 and FY26.
  • To consider dividend recommendation for FY26.
  • Trading window closed from April 1 to May 16, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MUKAND LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RATEGAIN] RateGain Launches RG Varsity for AI-Era Hotel Marketing
item.description:
RateGain Travel Technologies Limited has launched RG Varsity, a digital marketing certification program for hotel professionals. This initiative aims to help hotels navigate the rapidly changing customer acquisition landscape, optimize ad spends, and connect marketing decisions directly to revenue outcomes in the AI era. The program addresses a significant industry challenge where hotels struggle to understand and improve return on ad spend despite increasing digital marketing budgets and sophisticated tools. RG Varsity's curriculum focuses on practical application, covering digital marketing fundamentals, performance optimization, and building a digital revenue strategy. It is designed to bridge the gap between available technology and actual outcomes, offering career relevance for individuals and better-equipped teams for hotel organizations. The program is now available globally.

  • RateGain launched RG Varsity, a digital marketing certification program for hotels.
  • Program aims to help hotels optimize ad spend and drive revenue with AI.
  • Addresses the industry's "clarity gap" in using AI-driven marketing tools.
  • Curriculum covers fundamentals, performance optimization, and revenue strategy.
  • Available globally, fostering a community of certified practitioners.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RateGain Travel Technologies Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [ORGANICREC] Organic Recycling Systems: Suhrud Patel sells 0.08% stake
item.description:
Suhrud Chimanbhai Patel has disclosed the sale of 7,200 equity shares of Organic Recycling Systems Ltd through an open market transaction on April 9, 2026. This disposal represents a 0.08% reduction in his shareholding. Prior to the sale, Patel held 555,243 shares, equivalent to 6.41% of the company's paid-up equity capital. Following the transaction, his stake in Organic Recycling Systems Ltd has decreased to 548,043 shares, or 6.33% of the total equity. The disclosure was made in compliance with Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Suhrud C. Patel sold 7,200 equity shares of Organic Recycling Systems.
  • The open market sale occurred on April 9, 2026.
  • His stake reduced by 0.08%, from 6.41% to 6.33%.
  • The transaction was disclosed under SEBI Takeover Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Organic Recycling Systems Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [ROSELABS] Roselabs Finance Board to meet on Apr 16 for FY26 results
item.description:
Roselabs Finance Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene a meeting on Thursday, April 16, 2026. The primary agenda for this meeting is to consider and approve the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and the full financial year ended March 31, 2026. In compliance with the company's Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading, the trading window for designated persons has been closed from April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of these financial results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 16, 2026.
  • To consider and approve Q4 and FY26 audited financial results.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, for designated persons.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ROSELABS FINANCE LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [COFORGE] Coforge gets all approvals for Encora acquisition; combined entity at ~$2.5B run rate
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Coforge announced that it has secured all necessary regulatory and statutory clearances across multiple jurisdictions for its acquisition of Encora. This development clears the path for the transaction to close. The acquisition, initially announced on December 26, 2025, is set to create a combined entity operating at an estimated ~$2.5 billion run rate, with a core of $2 billion in AI-led engineering, data, and cloud services. Integration planning and execution are progressing as per schedule, with leadership continuity being a key priority. The company's cost optimization program for General & Administrative (G&A) functions is on track to deliver a 20-25% reduction in G&A costs for the combined business, ensuring the achievement of margin guidance. Front-end commercial and sales teams are prepared for collaborative operations immediately post-closing, with the merger expected by the end of April 2026.

  • All regulatory and statutory approvals for Encora acquisition are secured.
  • Combined entity projected to operate at ~$2.5B run rate post-merger.
  • Integration planning and G&A cost optimization are progressing on schedule.
  • Company expects 20-25% G&A cost reduction, confident in margin guidance.
  • Merger anticipated by end of April 2026, targeting accelerated growth.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Coforge Ltd | Category: Acquisitions
